data: {"type":"content_block_delta","index":0,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":"{\"file\":\"handler.ts\",\"content\":\"import { run, signal, waitSignal } from \\\"zttp:durable\\\";\\nimport type { Spec } from \\\"zttp:types\\\";\\n\\ntype WorkflowGuarantees = Spec<\\n    | \\\"deterministic\\\"\\n    | \\\"state_isolated\\\"\\n    | \\\"result_safe\\\"\\n    | \\\"optional_safe\\\"\\n    | \\\"no_secret_leakage\\\"\\n    | \\\"no_credential_leakage\\\"\\n    | \\\"input_validated\\\"\\n    | \\\"pii_contained\\\"\\n    | \\\"injection_safe\\\"\\n    | \\\"canonical\\\"\\n>;\\n\\nfunction handler(req: Request): Response & WorkflowGuarantees {\\n  const key = req.headers.get(\\\"idempotency-key\\\") ?? \\\"approval-demo\\\";\\n  if (req.path === \\\"/signal\\\") {\\n    return Response.json({ delivered: signal(key, \\\"approved\\\", { approved: true }) });\\n  }\\n  return run(key, () => {\\n    const approval = waitSignal(\\\"approved\\\");\\n    return Response.json({ resumed: true, approval });\\n  });\\n}\\n\"}"}}
